06 AI Render — Power Form Image

陆家嘴街道 AI 渲染报告

同一固定机位下,把每种权力体制的体块(结构,实算)与AI 渲染(表面,论述)并排对照。 提示词显式拆成 [计算层](从 05 实算的栋数/高度/形态指纹)与 [论述层](config.yaml 里主张的外观)。

结构 = 诚实

体块由 pipeline 计算,footprint / 高度 / 天际线可追溯。参考图约束 AI 不许加减楼。

表面 = 论述

材质 / 氛围是 config.yaml 里写的主张,illustrative,非这座城真实的样子。

逐权力体制:结构、表面、提示词

现状

current
3263 栋最高 ~338 m平均 ~33 m瘦长比 1.4
[计算层] 诚实,可追溯

approximately 3263 buildings, supertall towers up to ~338 m, average height ~33 m

[论述层] illustrative,可改 config.yaml

the district as it currently stands, mixed building ages, heights and uses, realistic everyday materials

完整 prompt(发给模型)
aerial three-quarter view of an urban district, fixed camera of a riverside Shanghai financial district by the Huangpu river. Structure (from the reference image): approximately 3263 buildings, supertall towers up to ~338 m, average height ~33 m. Appearance: the district as it currently stands, mixed building ages, heights and uses, realistic everyday materials. photorealistic architectural visualization, soft daylight, gentle atmospheric haze. strictly preserve the exact massing, building footprints, heights and skyline of the reference image; do not invent, add, remove or move buildings. high detail, realistic materials, ambient occlusion, coherent lighting

开发商主导

developer_led
3409 栋最高 ~480 m平均 ~120 m瘦长比 6.9
[计算层] 诚实,可追溯

approximately 3409 buildings, supertall towers up to ~480 m, average height ~120 m, very slender tower profiles

[论述层] illustrative,可改 config.yaml

capital-driven CBD of slender glass needle-towers, reflective curtain walls, polished granite plazas, dense and vertical, dusk glow

完整 prompt(发给模型)
aerial three-quarter view of an urban district, fixed camera of a riverside Shanghai financial district by the Huangpu river. Structure (from the reference image): approximately 3409 buildings, supertall towers up to ~480 m, average height ~120 m, very slender tower profiles. Appearance: capital-driven CBD of slender glass needle-towers, reflective curtain walls, polished granite plazas, dense and vertical, dusk glow. photorealistic architectural visualization, soft daylight, gentle atmospheric haze. strictly preserve the exact massing, building footprints, heights and skyline of the reference image; do not invent, add, remove or move buildings. high detail, realistic materials, ambient occlusion, coherent lighting

政府主导 / 中央集权

state_led
3263 栋最高 ~529 m平均 ~35 m瘦长比 1.1
[计算层] 诚实,可追溯

approximately 3263 buildings, supertall towers up to ~529 m, average height ~35 m, a single dominant peak (high height contrast)

[论述层] illustrative,可改 config.yaml

monumental state architecture, massive stone-and-concrete civic blocks converging toward a central peak, axial boulevards, formal symmetrical plazas, daytime

完整 prompt(发给模型)
aerial three-quarter view of an urban district, fixed camera of a riverside Shanghai financial district by the Huangpu river. Structure (from the reference image): approximately 3263 buildings, supertall towers up to ~529 m, average height ~35 m, a single dominant peak (high height contrast). Appearance: monumental state architecture, massive stone-and-concrete civic blocks converging toward a central peak, axial boulevards, formal symmetrical plazas, daytime. photorealistic architectural visualization, soft daylight, gentle atmospheric haze. strictly preserve the exact massing, building footprints, heights and skyline of the reference image; do not invent, add, remove or move buildings. high detail, realistic materials, ambient occlusion, coherent lighting

居民自建为主

resident_self_build
11182 栋最高 ~142 m平均 ~16 m瘦长比 1.9
[计算层] 诚实,可追溯

approximately 11182 buildings, high-rises up to ~142 m, average height ~16 m

[论述层] illustrative,可改 config.yaml

fine-grain self-built low-rise vernacular, brick and tile, organic narrow lanes, rooftop additions, laundry and greenery, lived-in and informal

完整 prompt(发给模型)
aerial three-quarter view of an urban district, fixed camera of a riverside Shanghai financial district by the Huangpu river. Structure (from the reference image): approximately 11182 buildings, high-rises up to ~142 m, average height ~16 m. Appearance: fine-grain self-built low-rise vernacular, brick and tile, organic narrow lanes, rooftop additions, laundry and greenery, lived-in and informal. photorealistic architectural visualization, soft daylight, gentle atmospheric haze. strictly preserve the exact massing, building footprints, heights and skyline of the reference image; do not invent, add, remove or move buildings. high detail, realistic materials, ambient occlusion, coherent lighting

共享 / 公共平权

shared
3263 栋最高 ~142 m平均 ~38 m瘦长比 2.9
[计算层] 诚实,可追溯

approximately 3263 buildings, high-rises up to ~142 m, average height ~38 m, slender profiles, an even, uniform skyline (low height contrast)

[论述层] illustrative,可改 config.yaml

egalitarian mid-rise blocks of even height, generous shared ground level, courtyards, trees and public greenery, calm low-contrast palette

完整 prompt(发给模型)
aerial three-quarter view of an urban district, fixed camera of a riverside Shanghai financial district by the Huangpu river. Structure (from the reference image): approximately 3263 buildings, high-rises up to ~142 m, average height ~38 m, slender profiles, an even, uniform skyline (low height contrast). Appearance: egalitarian mid-rise blocks of even height, generous shared ground level, courtyards, trees and public greenery, calm low-contrast palette. photorealistic architectural visualization, soft daylight, gentle atmospheric haze. strictly preserve the exact massing, building footprints, heights and skyline of the reference image; do not invent, add, remove or move buildings. high detail, realistic materials, ambient occlusion, coherent lighting

过渡动画

互动画布(找角度,导出 ControlNet 条件图)

拖拽 orbit 找机位、切权力体制、导出 massing / depth / normal / seg / canny。自含单档,浏览器直接开。

开互动画布 canvas.html

诚实边界

  • 渲染图 illustrative:体块忠实(参考图约束 + negative 护栏),外观是 AI 按论述层想象。
  • 模型偶尔仍偷改天际线,出图肉眼核对体块有没有被篡改。
  • 动画:算子强度扫描最诚实(每帧真算子);crossfade 是观感润色,中间态混合/想象。
  • 固定机位贯穿:相机不动,画面里动的只有形态 = 纯权力信号。
